Returns a value indicating whether property values are encrypted.

IsDynamicFk
Returns a value indicating whether values can be interpreted as dynamic foreign keys in the DbObjectKey format.
IsMAllKeyMember
IsMultiLine
IsMultiValued
IsPrimaryKeyMember
IsRange
Returns a value indicating whether values are to be interpreted as a value range according to ValueRange.
IsReadOnly
Returns a flag indicating whether the property is read-only in this context.
IsValidColumnForFiltering
Returns a flag indicating whether the property supports filtering.
IsValidColumnForGrouping
Returns a flag indicating whether the property supports grouping.

Returns a flag indicating whether the property supports sorting.
